LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Armorer.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] worked as an armorer for the Enclave, specializing in the maintenance, repair, and distribution of advanced power armor and energy weapons. With extensive knowledge of pre-war military technology, [PAWN_pronoun] was trusted to outfit elite soldiers with the finest equipment available. [PAWN_nameDef] took pride in [PAWN_possessive] work, ensuring every suit of armor and weapon functioned flawlessly. [PAWN_possessive] expertise and dedication made [PAWN_objective] a cornerstone of the Enclave's military strength.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Armorer.title: Enclave Armorer
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Arsenal_Specialist: The Enclaveâ€™s high-tech gear needed a lot of maintenance to remain in pristine condition. [PAWN_nameDef] was an Enclave arsenal specialist. [PAWN_possessive] job was to repair the advanced power armour of the Enclaveâ€™s Troopers, as well as their high-tech plasma and laser weapons. There were very few communities in the wasteland that were capable of crafting such marvels of technology and the [PAWN_nameDef] zealously guarded these secrets.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Biologist.descript: The Enclave was very concerned with the exposure of their members to the almost omnipresent radiation of the wasteland. As such, they were careful what their members consumed. [PAWN_nameDef] was tasked with growing the necessary foodstuffs for the Enclave. While people in the wasteland couldnâ€™t be too picky about what they ate, [PAWN_pronoun] generally preferred to grow corn and other non-mutated crops of the pre-war world, instead of their mutated successors, like tatos.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Biologist.title: Enclave Biologist
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Bureaucrat.descrip: While the Enclaveâ€™s bureaucracy was considerably smaller compared to the one of her old-world pendant, it still needed numerous bureaucrats to tend to the copious amounts of paperwork that accumulated over the years. [PAWN_nameDef] was one of those faceless paper pushers and spent most of [PAWN_possessive] life in cramped offices and dusty conference rooms. While [PAWN_nameDef], was an efficient and competent clerk, [PAWN_pronoun] was rather solitary.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Bureaucrat.title: Enclave Bureaucrat
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Compassionate_Chil: Unusual for a child raised in the Enclave, [PAWN_nameDef] showed compassion and mercy on other creatures, even those deemed lower by fellow Enclave members. These character traits made life within the organisation difficult for [PAWN_objective] and [PAWN_pronoun] distanced [PAWN_objective]self from most others.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Conscripted_Adjuta: The Enclave never was a particularly numerous group and was, consequentially often short on staff. [PAWN_nameDef] grew up within the lower ranks of the Enclave and was conscripted into service at a young age. [PAWN_pronoun] worked as an adjutant for an Enclave officer. [PAWN_possessive] supervisor wasnâ€™t a particularly friendly person, but [PAWN_nameDef] learned a lot about the day-to-day duties of a military officer and remembered these lessons well.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Engineer_Trainee.d: The complex machinery the Enclave depended upon needed near constant supervision and maintenance. This meant that skilled engineers were always needed and children with a knack for machinery, such as [PAWN_nameDef] were put into training in their early youth.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Entitled_Scion.des: [PAWN_nameDef] was born into the highest echelons of Enclave society. [PAWN_pronoun] was used to underlings taking care of [PAWN_possessive] every need and whim, while [PAWN_pronoun] trained and studied for a career in the leading positions of the Enclave.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Foot_Soldier.descr: [PAWN_nameDef] was a rank-and-file soldier within the Enclave. Of course, rank-and-file in this case meant [PAWN_pronoun] was an excellently trained fighter, equipped with some of the finest equipment of post-war America and instilled with nothing but scorn and disdain for the average wastelander and all other inhabitants of the wasteland, mutated or not.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Foot_Soldier.title: Enclave Foot Soldier
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Hellfire_Trooper.d: [PAWN_nameDef] was with the Enclave hellfire troopers, an elite group of Enclave soldiers equipped with experimental hellfire power armour and heavy napalm throwers called incinerators. Due to [PAWN_possessive] yearlong service with the hellfire troopers [PAWN_nameDef] developed a ratherâ€¦ unwholesome fascination with fire, especially when it was brought in contact with living beings.
[PAWN_nameDef] once was a regular farmer, but [PAWN_possessive] life changed the day [PAWN_possessive] humble farmstead was visited by a man in a trench coat and his entourage of armoured brutes. It did not take much intimidation to â€œpersuadeâ€ [PAWN_nameDef] to serve [PAWN_possessive] country and deliver the produce of the farmstead to a nearby Enclave outpost.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Indentured_Laboure: Once an ordinary wastelander [PAWN_nameDef], wandered around until that fateful day when [PAWN_pronoun] walked right into an Enclave patrol. The heavily armed soldiers clad in pitch-black power armour told [PAWN_objective] that the country needed [PAWN_possessive] service. [PAWN_nameDef] had no idea what that meant, but before [PAWN_pronoun] could react, [PAWN_pronoun] was knocked unconscious and dragged away, to serve as a labourer for the Enclave, fulfilling all kinds of menial work for [PAWN_possessive] new masters.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Indentured_Servant: Many tasks were just beneath the higher-ranking members of the Enclave. [PAWN_nameDef] was abducted by an Enclave patrol to handle some of these tasks. [PAWN_pronoun] was not only put to work as a custodian but was also responsible for negotiations with wastelanders in those rare cases, where the Enclave did not resort to violence to achieve her goals as well as supervising the indentured labourers and similar tasks the officers didnâ€™t want to besmirch themselves with.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Junior_Civil_Serva: After finishing basic education [PAWN_nameDef] was assigned to serve within the byzantine bureaucracy of the Enclave, which ensured the functionality of the organisation. The institutionâ€™s focus on ruthless efficiency made [PAWN_objective] cold and unkind.
Every once in a while, the Enclave would scour the Wasteland in search of new â€œworkersâ€. While the patrols preferred to abduct adults, they werenâ€™t opposed to capturing children. [PAWN_nameDef] was one of those unfortunate kids. While [PAWN_pronoun] was generally looked down upon most other members of the Enclave, it was possible, although unlikely for [PAWN_objective] to rise up to higher ranks within the organisation.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Lab_Assistant.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] showed great promise while being educated within the Enclave and was subsequently made a lab assistant. There [PAWN_pronoun] learned much about many scientific fields such as chemistry, physics, and biology from some of the brightest, albeit not very ethical minds of the Wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Levied_Recruit.des: The skills of the Enclaveâ€™s soldiers was the result of years of strenuous training under the supervision of remorseless drill sergeants. Due to a shortage of able recruits, [PAWN_nameDef] was levied into service as a child and spent most of [PAWN_possessive] youth in barracks and on training fields. This made [PAWN_objective] a great warrior indeed, but left little time for anything else, since the Enclave did not exactly promote creative thinking within the rank and file.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Officer.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] was an officer of the Enclave department of the army. [PAWN_pronoun] truly believed in the Enclaveâ€™s mission to rebuild the USA and was eager to do [PAWN_possessive] part to implement this vision. While [PAWN_pronoun] was a skilled soldier, [PAWN_possessive] true talent lay in motivating [PAWN_possessive] subordinates.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Officer.title: Enclave Officer
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Peacekeeper_in_Tra: The highly stratified society of the Enclave demanded absolute obedience from its citizenry. As an especially loyal child [PAWN_nameDef] was accepted into the ranks of the Enclave Peacekeeping Force, where [PAWN_pronoun] quickly learned how to ensure peace and order, especially within the conscripted masses of forced labourers, usually by means of a cattle prod.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Physician.descript: The Enclave had a number of highly-trained physicians, whose primary task was to tend to important personnel like officers or high-ranking politicians. [PAWN_nameDef] was one of those physicians. [PAWN_pronoun] lacked the distinctive contempt most other Enclave members felt for the inhabitants of the wasteland, a character trait that often put [PAWN_objective] at odds with [PAWN_possessive] superiors.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Physician.title: Enclave Physician
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Politician.descrip: As most people within the Enclave, [PAWN_nameDef] was raised to believe that all beings that dwelt in the wasteland were mutated and genetically inferior. [PAWN_pronoun] however, took these lessons more to heart than others and so [PAWN_pronoun] became a politician in the enclave, to advocate for the â€œcleansingâ€ of the wasteland so that, one day, the last unmutated humans could reclaim the land that is rightfully theirs and finally rebuild the nation that once was.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Politician.title: Enclave Politician
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Propagandist.descr: While the Enclave generally didnâ€™t look favourably upon the other inhabitants of the Wasteland, they had to grudgingly accept that they were useful at times. To keep the wastelanders (mis-)informed about the Enclaveâ€™s intents, [PAWN_nameDef] was instructed to write Propaganda material and distribute it in settlements surrounding the Enclaveâ€™s outpost.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Propagandist.title: Enclave Propagandist
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Quartermaster.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] served as a quartermaster for the Enclave, responsible for managing and distributing uniforms, supplies, and essential equipment to soldiers and personnel. Known for [PAWN_possessive] meticulous record-keeping and efficient logistics, [PAWN_pronoun] ensured that every unit was properly outfitted for duty. With an eye for detail and a talent for negotiation, [PAWN_nameDef] became an invaluable asset to the Enclave's supply chain, maintaining the organization's operational readiness even in the harshest conditions.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Secret_Service_Age: Nominally, the secret service is still tasked with the protection of the president of the United States. However, most Enclave presidents used them as elite troops, charged with the most pressing matters of national security. [PAWN_nameDef] was part of this elite troop. [PAWN_pronoun] was a perfectly trained killing machine, with a total lack of empathy only concerned with the fulfilment of the presidentâ€™s orders. Even other Enclave members shuddered at [PAWN_possessive] cold, calculating personality.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Tesla_Soldier.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] was a tesla soldier with the Enclave. As the name suggests, these elite troopers are known and feared for their advanced tesla power armour and their prowess with heavy plasma weaponry. Lucky for the inhabitants of the wasteland, [PAWN_nameDef] and the tesla soldiers [PAWN_pronoun] belonged to were a rather rare sight, deployed only against the Enclaveâ€™s most stubborn and dangerous enemies.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Warden.description: While most wastelanders were more of a nuisance to the Enclave than an actual threat, there were some culprits that caused more trouble. [PAWN_nameDef] was a warden with the Enclave and [PAWN_possessive] job was to look after the unfortunate prisoners of the Enclave, as well as to extract all important information from them, even if they werenâ€™t in possession of such knowledge. As soon as [PAWN_possessive] superiors thought they gained all useful information from a prisoner, it was up to [PAWN_nameDef] execute them, which [PAWN_pronoun] often did in a grisly manner.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Warden.title: Enclave Warden
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Zoologist.descript: The Enclave was always interested in the mutated wildlife that dwelled in the wasteland. However, their intentions were less based on scientific curiosity and more on the desire to weaponize the horrific beasts roaming the irradiated landscape. [PAWN_nameDef] was a zoologist with the Enclave and conducted cruel experiments on many different beasts to test their suitability for combat, as well as methods to control them. While [PAWN_pronoun] was a respected scientist, [PAWN_pronoun] also showed sadistic tendencies and was avoided by most other Enclave members.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Zoologist.title: Enclave Zoologist
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Holt_Adult.title: Enclave Defector
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Holt_Child.title: Brotherhood Trainee
